prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第2章　桜の折り返し / 第2話　折り返して戻る. Scene focus: 第1節　折り返しの河岸段 / セラパート. Summary: 折り返し地点の上段では、測量員を装った男が三脚へ小型の観測機材を載せ、もう一人が河岸段の上から遊歩道を見張っていた。狙いは歩調変化の観測だった。… Key beats: 折り返し地点の上段では、測量員を装った男が三脚へ小型の観測機材を載せ、もう一人が河岸段の上から遊歩道を見張っていた。狙いは折り返しの歩調変化と視線の癖を拾うことだ。標的がいちど歩きに落とす場所は、連中にとって格好の観測点になる。 セラはコンクリートの retaining wall に沿って身を寄せ、手すりと機材の位置関係を確かめた。河川敷の静けさを汚すには、機材の角度があまりにも露骨だ。川沿いの風が抜け、猫耳カチューシャ型の警護支援ユニットが軽く振動する。距離は近い。処理は短くて済む。 「区切りの呼吸くらい、勝手に取らせてください」 三脚の脚へつま先を入れ、支点だけを浮かせる。観測機材は倒れず、角度だけが空を向いた。男が慌てて抱え直したところへ、セラの手刀が手首を切る。上段の見張り役が動いた瞬間には、河岸段の手すりを踏み台にして間合いを詰め、膝裏を払った。身体は遊歩道側へ滑らせ、コンクリートへ余計な音を立てさせない。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sera-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sera-part of the same riverside-turnaround incident as scene-002-002-001-sato. Keep the same concrete riverside steps, same retaining wall, and same spring light as the paired image. Sato must remain an unaware background figure pausing or turning back, and must not look toward Sera or the incident. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a cute maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a covert riverside-turnaround action image with Sera dominant as she disrupts observation gear or a spotter hidden above a modern embankment turnaround point. Use concrete steps, steel railings, retaining walls, cherry-blossom drift, and practical river infrastructure rather than any shrine or temple motifs. Keep Sato smaller in the background, simply taking a walking break and unaware.
